examples: Crack is a highly potent and addictive derivative of cocaine.
This is one of the most potent ways, Tice found, to put anger to rest.
The other half of the name represents another ingredient, less infamous, perhaps, but also strangely potent: the kola nut.
Next Lutnick ignored a potent threat from two rivals that merged to form BrokerTec.
The problem is that simvastatin is not as potent a drug as either atorvastatin or Crestor.
